dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3260 IS: Ending Subsidies for Political Junk Mail Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Ernst (for herself and Ms. Cortez Masto) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs

form.official-title: To repeal the reduced postage rate for qualified political committees.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Ending Subsidies for Political Junk Mail Act.

section.header: Repeal of reduced postage rate for qualified political committees
section.text: Section 3626 of title 39, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating subsections (f), (g), and (h) as subsections (e), (f), and (g), respectively;
by redesignating subsections (j) through (n) as subsections (h) through (l), respectively; and
in subsection (h), as redesignated by paragraph (3)—

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (1)(D), by striking subsection (m)(2) and inserting subsection (k)(2); and
in paragraph (3)(B), by striking subsection (m) and inserting subsection (k).
